title: Hiring meta — what it is & how I uncovered it
body: Uncovered through A/B outreach tests, network-mapping of amplifiers, and interviews. Quick wins: 1) write a 1-sentence hiring story; 2) activate 3–5 amplifiers before posting; 3) use warm DM from mutual contact.
